options.name: -def
options.description: Specifies the full pathname of the partition def file .

options.name: -file
options.description: Specifies the full pathname of the partition floorplan file .

options.name: -ptnName
options.description: Specifies the name of the partition.

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the optional report filename that contains any pins deleted or newly added.

options.name: -snapModifiedToBoundary
options.description: Snap pins to modified partition boundary.
